intro: Between 13 and 24 April 2026, ZCyberNews published 11 articles under the enterprise-security tag, covering four critical and three high-severity vulnerabilities. The most notable CVEs were CVE-2026-27681, with a CVSS score of 9.9, and CVE-2025-54987, rated 9.8. These threats impacted the technology, financial services, healthcare, enterprise, and government sectors globally, with specific focus on Europe and North America. The coverage also included one medium and two informational severity items, providing a broad view of the current enterprise security landscape.
